esv_version: In peace I will both lie down and sleep.
niv_version: In peace I will lie down and sleep.
reflection: God gives you peaceful sleep because He watches over you all night. You can rest safely in His love.
live_it_out:
1. Say a bedtime prayer thanking God for the day.
2. Think of something peaceful before closing your eyes.
3. Feel safe knowing God is near.

esv_version: O LORD, in the morning you hear my voice.
niv_version: In the morning, LORD, you hear my voice.
reflection: Every morning God listens when you talk to Him. He loves your morning hello more than anything.
live_it_out:
1. Say good morning to God first thing.
2. Tell Him one thing you hope for today.
3. Smile knowing He heard you.

esv_version: You make known to me the path of life.
niv_version: You make known to me the path of life.
reflection: God shows you the best way to live—full of life and happiness. He walks with you.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God to show you His good path.
2. Follow one kind thing today.
3. Thank Him for guiding you.

esv_version: Oh, taste and see that the LORD is good!
niv_version: Taste and see that the LORD is good.
reflection: God is good in every way. When you look for His goodness, you will find it everywhere.
live_it_out:
1. Notice one good thing God did today.
2. Say "God is good!" with a big smile.
3. Share something good with a friend.

esv_version: Be still, and know that I am God.
niv_version: Be still, and know that I am God.
reflection: In the busy day, God invites you to be still for a little while. He is right there, and that is enough.
live_it_out:
1. Sit quietly for one minute and think of God.
2. Take three slow breaths and say His name.
3. Feel peaceful knowing He is God.

esv_version: In God, whose word I praise—in God I trust.
niv_version: In God, whose word I praise—in God I trust.
reflection: You can trust God completely. His words are true and He never lets you down.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I trust You, God" out loud.
2. Praise God for His good words.
3. Choose trust instead of worry.

esv_version: For he will command his angels concerning you to guard you.
niv_version: For he will command his angels concerning you to guard you in all your ways.
reflection: God sends His angels to watch over you. You are never alone—He keeps you safe every step.
live_it_out:
1. Whisper "Thank You for Your angels, God."
2. Feel safe when you walk or play.
3. Draw a picture of God protecting you.

esv_version: For the LORD is good; his steadfast love endures forever.
niv_version: For the LORD is good and his love endures forever.
reflection: God’s love never, ever stops. It lasts longer than forever. You can rest in that safe love every day.
live_it_out:
1. Hug your favorite stuffed animal and think of God’s hug.
2. Say "God’s love lasts forever" out loud.
3. Share that love with one person today.

esv_version: Your word is a lamp to my feet.
niv_version: Your word is a lamp for my feet.
reflection: The Bible is like a little flashlight for your path. God uses it to show you the way. You never have to walk in the dark.
live_it_out:
1. Listen to a Bible story today.
2. Ask someone to read you a verse.
3. Say "Thank You, God, for Your light."

esv_version: My help comes from the LORD, who made heaven and earth.
niv_version: My help comes from the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.
reflection: When you need help, God is right there. He made the whole big world, yet He cares about your little needs.
live_it_out:
1. When something feels hard, say "God, please help me."
2. Look up at the sky and remember He made it all.
3. Thank Him for being your helper today.

esv_version: I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
niv_version: I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
reflection: God made you in a special and wonderful way. You are exactly who He dreamed you to be. He loves every part of you.
live_it_out:
1. Look in the mirror and say "God made me wonderful!"
2. Draw a picture of something you like about yourself.
3. Thank God for making you unique.

esv_version: Trust in the LORD with all your heart.
niv_version: Trust in the LORD with all your heart.
reflection: God wants you to trust Him with your whole heart. He knows what is best and loves you more than you can imagine.
live_it_out:
1. When you worry, tell God and trust Him.
2. Hold your hands open like you’re giving Him your worries.
3. Remember He is always trustworthy.

esv_version: A friend loves at all times.
niv_version: A friend loves at all times.
reflection: God gives us friends who love us no matter what. Being a good friend shows God’s love in a special way.
live_it_out:
1. Play nicely with a friend today.
2. Say something kind to make them smile.
3. Thank God for the friends He gave you.

esv_version: Be kind to one another.
niv_version: Be kind to one another.
reflection: God is so kind to you every day. He whispers that you can be kind too. Little acts of kindness make the world brighter.
live_it_out:
1. Help pick up toys without being asked.
2. Share your snack with someone.
3. Say "please" and "thank you" with a smile.

esv_version: I can do all things through him who strengthens me.
niv_version: I can do all things through him who gives me strength.
reflection: When something feels hard, God gives you His strength. You are never alone in trying new things. He cheers you on.
live_it_out:
1. Try something new and say "God helps me!"
2. Keep going even if it’s tricky.
3. Tell God thank you for His strength.

esv_version: We love because he first loved us.
niv_version: We love because he first loved us.
reflection: God loved you first, even before you could say His name. His love is like a warm hug that never ends.
live_it_out:
1. Give someone a hug and say "God loves you!"
2. Draw a picture of something you love about God.
3. Be kind to a friend today because God is kind to you.

esv_version: The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
niv_version: The LORD is my shepherd, I lack nothing.
reflection: God is like the best shepherd who takes care of His sheep. He makes sure you have everything you need.
live_it_out:
1. Thank God for taking care of you like a shepherd.
2. Share something you have with a friend.
3. Feel happy knowing God is watching over you.

esv_version: This is the day that the LORD has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.
niv_version: This is the day the LORD has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.
reflection: God made today just for you! It’s a brand-new gift filled with His love. We can smile and be happy because He is with us.
live_it_out:
1. When you wake up, say "Thank you, God, for this happy day!"
2. Smile at someone and share kindness.
3. Remember God made today special for you.

esv_version: I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
niv_version: I am fearfully and wonderfully made.
reflection: God made you in a special and wonderful way. You are exactly who He dreamed you to be. He loves every part of you.
live_it_out:
1. Look in the mirror and say "God made me wonderful!"
2. Draw a picture of something you like about yourself.
3. Thank God for making you unique.

niv_version: Trust in the LORD with all your heart.
reflection: God wants you to trust Him with your whole heart. He knows what is best and loves you more than you can imagine.
live_it_out:
1. When you worry, tell God and trust Him.
2. Hold your hands open like you’re giving Him your worries.
3. Remember He is always trustworthy.

live_it_out:

2. Say something kind to make them smile.
3. Thank God for the friends He gave you.
